flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Central Christian College of Kansas are 15% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($44.5k vs $52.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at Central Christian College of Kansas vs the 2018–2022 baseline (394 vs 556).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Christian College of Kansas fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (497 → 380).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Central Christian College of Kansas fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (50.4% → 45.0%).
